image.title: Image Component
image.description: Inserts inline images into the story timeline with customizable layout, scale, and alignment.
instructions: **URL**: Provide a direct web link to any image file (PNG, JPG, SVG, GIF, WebP, AVIF).
**Sizing & Alignment**: Customize alignment (Left, Center, Right) and scaling percentage to fit your design.
**Captions**: Add optional sub-caption text to display directly below the image for credits, descriptions, or comments.

music.title: Music Player
music.description: Embeds background audio streams from YouTube that play during the intro sequence.
instructions: **Link**: Paste any YouTube video or livestream link. The player automatically extracts the video ID.
**Settings**: Adjust default volume levels and loop behavior.
**Mute Controls**: Adds a global audio mute button in the top-right header of your visual novel.

sfx.title: Sound Effects Player
sfx.description: Interactive sound triggers styled with animated audio waveforms.
instructions: **Audio Source**: Provide a direct URL to an audio clip (e.g. MP3, WAV).
**Waveform Animation**: Includes a pure CSS-animated audio bar jump graphic indicating audio capabilities.
**Redirect Fallback**: Since JavaScript is restricted, the player links directly to the media source to trigger playback in the host environment.

gif-heading.title: Gif Heading
gif-heading.description: Stylized text headers featuring animated backgrounds and glowing outlines.
instructions: Use this for grand chapter titles, section names, or act breaks.
**Outlines**: Uses CSS text stroke properties to overlay bright fonts against background textures.
**Presets**: Choose from pre-configured text outlines and act divider lines.

dialogue.title: Dialogue Box
dialogue.description: Classic character speech box displaying speaker names, portraits, and conversation transcripts.
instructions: **Name Tag**: Specify the character speaking.
**Focus Mode**: Double-click or click inside the dialogue box in the canvas preview to open the VS-Code style **Focus Editor**.
**Formatting**: Use the Focus Editor toolbar to easily apply bold, italics, custom fonts, colored highlights, or size changes directly to segments of dialogue text.

quote.title: Quotes Banner
quote.description: Stylized blockquotes for highlighting quotes, thoughts, or historical snippets.
instructions: **Author**: Optional citation line that displays underneath the quote (prefixed with `—`).
**Presets**: Select Double Line borders, Minimal Dots, or Faded Line separator designs.

terminal.title: Terminal Console
terminal.description: Displays text in a monospaced layout simulating command prompts, code transcripts, or system logs.
instructions: **Markup**: Supports markdown inside the text body.
**Layout**: Styled with custom dark backing code pads, borders, and margins.
Ideal for computer outputs, tech diagnostic transcripts, or system prompts.

link.title: Link Button
link.description: Banners styled as clickable buttons that link to external sites or profiles.
instructions: **Target URL**: Provide the destination link.
**Target Window**: Choose whether the link opens in a new tab (`_blank`) or the same tab (`_self`).
**Design**: Features hover transitions and responsive sizing.

scene-break.title: Scene Break
scene-break.description: Horizontal separator lines used to mark time skips, POV shifts, or section changes.
instructions: **Text Break**: Customize the separator text (defaults to `✦ ✦ ✦`).
**Line Styles**: Renders fine lines extending outwards from the central text separator.

lore.title: Lore Database
lore.description: Interactive, collapsible accordion drawers used to present codex database entries.
instructions: **Headers**: Set term titles and categories.
**Collapsible Layout**: Utilizes CSS state checkboxes so users can expand or collapse individual lore files on click.

vn-iframe.title: VN Engine Iframe
vn-iframe.description: Nests a full external game frame or interactive story engine directly inside the page.
instructions: **Iframe URL**: Provide the address of the hosted game.
**Responsive Scaling**: Embeds with responsive sizing constraints to prevent layout breaks on mobile screens.

character.title: Character Hub
character.description: Aligns character sprites and portraits side-by-side against a background image.
instructions: **Backdrop**: Set a background scene image URL.
**Actors List**: Add multiple character rows specifying their names and sprite image paths.
**Layout**: The sprites are arranged side-by-side horizontally using a flex grid.

card-template.title: Private Dispatch Card
card-template.description: An elegant, classic document card styled as a dispatch envelope with a custom wax seal.
instructions: Fill in the card header, main message text, signature label, signature name, and a custom character for the wax seal.
**Rich Editor vs Raw HTML**: You can toggle Edit Mode to 'Raw HTML/CSS Template' to build your own custom structure.
**HTML Placeholders**: Use `{{title}}`, `{{content}}`, `{{sigLabel}}`, `{{sigName}}`, and `{{stamp}}` in your raw template to map the input fields dynamically.
**Interactivity**: The card is styled with a hover lift and a click scale transition. You can configure it to link/redirect to external sites.

card-bladerunner.title: Bladerunner Terminal Card
card-bladerunner.description: A dark cyberpunk terminal interface featuring monospaced typewritten console logs, blinking cursor, and status bars.
instructions: Customize the relay node names (Header Left/Right), authorization tokens, trace percentages, and end transmission text.
**Formatting**: Console text supports standard markdown formatting (bold, italic, code tags). Use `>` at the beginning of lines to simulate terminal commands.
**Fixed Height & Auto Scroll**: Set a fixed height (e.g. `250px`) in the config. This enables a terminal scroll viewport that hides scrollbars and keeps newer text lines anchored to the bottom.

card-imessage.title: iMessage Chat Card
card-imessage.description: An interactive mockup of Apple's iMessage interface featuring animated chat bubble rows, avatars, and name tags.
instructions: Add characters with their avatars and specify their alignments (Left for incoming, Right for outgoing).
Add message bubbles and assign them to characters to build a timeline sequence.

**Stickers & Media**: Any message containing an image or GIF URL (ending in `.png`, `.jpg`, `.jpeg`, `.gif`, `.webp`, `.avif`, or using a base64 Data URI) will automatically render as a borderless sticker.

**Fixed Height & Live Chat Scroll**: Enter a height (e.g. `300px`) in the config. This hides the scrollbar and anchors the chat history to the bottom, keeping typing messages visible as they animate in.

card-steampunk.title: Steampunk Vault Card
card-steampunk.description: A copper-and-brass gear-operated puzzle lock box containing hidden classified documents.
instructions: Enter a vault title header, a secret message to reveal when unlocked, and a 3-digit combination code (e.g., `394`).
**Puzzle Mechanism**: In the preview/export window, users can click each of the 3 dials to rotate them. The puzzle uses pure CSS state logic and cyclic labels.
**Deciphering**: When the dial values align with your combination code, the vault door slides open to reveal the secret decoded text.

custom-html.title: Custom HTML
custom-html.description: Sandboxed raw HTML injection element for custom designs.
instructions: **Coding**: Write raw HTML tags. Inline styles are fully supported.
**Scope**: Use this block to add custom tables, audio lists, CSS animations, or custom structures that aren't available in standard components.

custom-iframe.title: Custom Iframe
custom-iframe.description: Nests any external website or media widget.
instructions: **Source**: Provide the external website URL.
**Height**: Customize the display frame height in pixels.

card-cyberpunk.title: Cyberpunk Messenger Card
card-cyberpunk.description: A screen-accurate clone of Cyberpunk 2077's phone contact chat menu, utilizing high-contrast retro-cyber aesthetics.
instructions: Add characters with their alignments (Left for Viktor Vektor's team, Right for V/player outgoing).
**Visual Novel Formatting**: Supports raw text and markdown. Any text wrapped in `**bold**` or `` `code` `` tags is fully parsed.
**Grip Drag-and-Drop**: Rearrange messages on the fly by holding the vertical handle on the left of each message row.
**Custom Shapes**: Utilizes advanced CSS polygon `clip-path` properties to render real-time pixel-perfect beveled borders with diagonal tail notches.

joyland-chat.title: Joyland Background Override
joyland-chat.description: Modifies the target site's global chat-main viewport background image, tinting, overlays, and blend-modes.
instructions: **GIF/Image Background**: Set any image or GIF URL (e.g. falling snow, starlight) to fill the entire website chat background.
**Overlay and Blending**: Define background overlay colors (e.g., dark velvet red) and blend modes to multiply or screen the texture with background graphics.

joyland-bubble.title: Joyland Message Bubble Override
joyland-bubble.description: Styles the main dialogue speech bubble frame, borders, glows, shadows, and interactive corner icons.
instructions: **Bubble Box Styling**: Change the background panel color, border width/radius/style, and add glowing shadow drop filters.
**Corner Animations**: Add a custom character/emoji (like a snowflake or gear) at the corners of the dialogue box, with configurable animation effects (spin, breathe, float, pulse) and speeds.
**Interactive Button Hover**: Set a custom hover icon that animates above clickable buttons on hover.

joyland-text.title: Joyland Typography Override
joyland-text.description: Overrides text fonts, sizes, headings decorations, bold-text breathing glows, and scrollbar stylings.
instructions: **Typography & Sizes**: Customize global fonts, main text sizes, strike-throughs, and blockquote borders.
**Bold Text Glow Animation**: Enable premium text breathing animations that glow or flicker based on chosen speed and colors.
**Heading Suffixes**: Set a custom emoji suffix (like holiday trees or sparkles) that automatically attaches to h1/h2/h3 headings.
**Scrollbars**: Override default browser scrollbars with custom thumb color gradients and track backgrounds.
